prompt: Using REFERENCE_0 as the character base, transform the subject into a fantasy Xianxia setting. Dress her in elaborate purple and gold traditional Chinese robes with a sheer purple veil. Add ornate gold and pearl hair accessories and long pointed nail guards. Change her pose so she is looking slightly away, with one hand raised delicately near her face and the other holding a large, glowing white lotus flower. Set the scene at night with a large full moon, a dark silhouette of a traditional temple roof, and cherry blossom branches. Apply an ethereal, magical purple-tinted moonlight effect.
